should_trigger.prompt: expert panel this blog post before I publish it
score my landing page copy — I want a real panel of critics, not just suggestions
rate these two email subject line variants and tell me which wins
run this through the panel and give me a quality score
quality check my sales page copy, I want it to hit 90 before we launch

should_not_trigger.prompt: fix the typos and grammar in this email
does this headline include the right keywords for SEO?
does this copy match our brand voice guidelines?
rewrite this paragraph to be shorter
